UserAnalytics.title: User Analytics
UserAnalytics.description: User profile tracking calculations run, compliance audits run, overall average quiz scores, and detailed breakdown of each course progress.

userId.description: Unique user credentials identifier from Firebase Authentication.

userName.description: User's full name or greeting handle.

courses.description: Map of course ID keys to progress stats.

overallScore.description: The dynamic average score across all course quizzes taken.

calculationsRun.description: Number of electrical load and conductor calculations executed.

checksRun.description: Number of code compliance audits executed.

/userAnalytics/{userId}.description: User stats and curriculum tracking records document mapped to user ID.
